com.affine.workspace.team-workspace.name: Team
com.affine.workspace.members.description: Looking to collaborate with more people?
com.affine.workspace.members.team.descri: Work together with unlimited team members.
com.affine.workspace.members.team.invite: Invite new members to join your workspace via email or share an invite link
Generate a link to invite members to your workspace
These email addresses have already been invited:
com.affine.workspace.members.team.revoke: You have canceled the invitation for {{name}}
com.affine.workspace.members.team.approv: You have approved the {{name}}’s request to join this workspace
com.affine.workspace.members.team.declin: You have declined the {{name}}’s request to join this workspace
com.affine.workspace.members.team.remove: You have removed {{name}} from this workspace
com.affine.workspace.members.team.change: You have successfully promoted {{name}} to Admin.
You have successfully changed {{name}} s role to collaborator.
com.affine.workspace.members.team.assign: You have successfully assigned {{name}} as the owner of this workspace.
You are about to transfer workspace ownership to {{name}}. Please review the following changes carefully:
Your role will be changed to Admin
You will lose ownership rights to the entire workspace
To confirm this transfer, please type the workspace name
com.affine.workspace.members.team.remove: This action will revoke their access to all workspace resources immediately.
com.affine.quota.storage-limit.descripti: El almacenamiento del servidor está lleno. Contacta al propietario del espacio de trabajo.
El almacenamiento del servidor está lleno. Elimina contenido innecesario o aumenta la cuota configurada.
com.affine.quota.storage-limit.new-descr: La sincronización está pausada porque este espacio de trabajo superó la cuota de almacenamiento configurada. Elimina contenido innecesario o aumenta la cuota del servidor para reanudarla.
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.title: Workspace sync paused
Your workspace has exceeded both storage and member limits, causing synchronization to pause. To resume syncing, please either:
Reduce storage usage and remove some team members
Aumentar el límite configurado de almacenamiento o miembros
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.owner.stora: Your workspace has exceeded its storage limit and synchronization has been paused. To resume syncing, please either:
Remove unnecessary files or content to reduce storage usage
Aumentar la cuota de almacenamiento configurada
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.owner.membe: Your workspace has reached its maximum member capacity and synchronization has been paused. To resume syncing, you can either
Remove some team members from the workspace
Aumentar el límite configurado de miembros
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.member.both: This workspace has exceeded both storage and member limits, causing synchronization to pause. Please contact your workspace owner to address these limits and resume syncing.
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.member.stor: Este espacio de trabajo superó su límite de almacenamiento y la sincronización está pausada. Contacta al propietario para reducir el uso o aumentar la cuota del servidor.
com.affine.quota.sync-paused.member.memb: Este espacio de trabajo alcanzó su límite de miembros y la sincronización está pausada. Contacta al propietario para ajustar miembros o aumentar el límite configurado.
com.affine.workspace.server.description: Sync and collaborate on your server
